sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 35

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 35:1
items.html: (to the question) The quality of Yesod means the level of NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod], which is the level of Malchut, as is known. Indeed, Malchut received there the very quality of the Yesod — that is, she was included in the particular Aviut [coarseness] of the Kli of Yesod, which is the discernment of its "step outward" [Pesi'a Lebar]. But together with this she also received a great sweetening, since there is in the Yesod a discernment of the completeness of Hochma, from what it receives of the discernment of the Yesod of AB; and this the Nukva also receives from it. (p. 768, Item 51; and in Ohr Pnimi, beginning "Pesi'a Lebar")
